message:
Add auto-labeler GitHub Action

Automatically labels PRs based on changed file paths:
- Content labels: guide, tutorial, explanation, reference, integration
- Infrastructure label: site (everything except src/content/**)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+# Configuration for actions/labeler
+# https://github.com/actions/labeler
+
+# === Content ===
+
+guide:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - src/content/docs/guides/**
+
+tutorial:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - src/content/docs/tutorials/**
+
+explanation:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - src/content/docs/explanations/**
+
+reference:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - src/content/docs/reference/**
+
+integration:
+  - changed-files:
+      - any-glob-to-any-file:
+          - src/content/docs/integrations/**
+
+# === Infrastructure ===
+
+site:
+  - all:
+      - changed-files:
+          - any-glob-to-any-file:
+              - "**/*"
+          - all-globs-to-all-files:
+              - "!src/content/**"

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+name: Auto-Label PRs
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+  pull-requests: write
+
+jobs:
+  path-labeler:
+    name: Path Labels
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/labeler@v6
+        with:
+          repo-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+          configuration-path: .github/labeler.yml
